creator: budijanto@studiokaraoke.co.id
text:
Hi,

# uname -a
FreeBSD SERVER 13.1-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p1 GENERIC amd64

I use pf on ethernet rl0:

# pciconf -lv
re0@pci0:5:0:0:	class=0x020000 rev=0x06 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x1186 device=0x4300 subvendor=0x1186 subdevice=0x4b10
    vendor     = 'D-Link System Inc'
    device     = 'DGE-528T Gigabit Ethernet Adapter'
    class      = network
    subclass   = ethernet

This snippet output from /var/log/message:
